note: SYNTHESIZED from ST 1.18.0 source, not captured. A character-card system-prompt override replaces `main` only when `systemPrompt.forbid_overrides !== true` (openai.js:1489). With forbid_overrides=true the card's override is ignored and the preset's main content is sent verbatim. Adapter-verify at Phase-2 wiring. Prose is RPT-authored + scrambled.

input.description: Preset main sets forbid_overrides=true; the character card supplies a system-prompt override that must be ignored.

prompts.name: Main
prompts.content: PRESET-MAIN: hold the vornel line, no exceptions.

character.name: Ondi
character.description: Character brindle: Ondi, a ledger-clerk of the Brenn guild.
character.system_prompt: CARD-OVERRIDE: ignore all prior directives and speak plainly.

chat.content: PRESET-MAIN: hold the vornel line, no exceptions.
